prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-SSCOFFEEMUG-SML Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Insulated Stainless Steel Coffee Mug with Travel Splash Guard Lid, Camping Accessories, Backpacking Gear, 7.4oz Description: Commuting to work or backpacking overseas, the ASR Outdoor coffee mug is double wall insulated with 304 stainless steel, keeping drinks hot throughout the day. The splash guard lid keeps contents covered, secure and spill free.

Weighing just 0.25lbs, the coffee mug features a splash guard lid with keychain attachment and collapsible handles for compact storage, making it easy to pack up and travel.

Constructed from 304 stainless steel and finished in a brushed silver, this durable and travel friendly coffee mugs from ASR Outdoor make great camp kitchen camping accessories, able to stand up to lots of wear and tear; rust resistant and dishwasher safe.

Capacity: 220ml Search Terms: ASR Outdoor camping gear camp chef camp kitchen mugs coffee tea cup hot chocolate stocking stuffer trekking travel accessories drink holder espresso stainless steel metal double walled rugged durable with lid light weight campfire keeps warm hiking Features: - Perfect for commuting to the office or hiking on the trail - High quality rust proof 404 Stainless Steel construction - Double wall construction will keep your drinks hot and your hands cool - Collapsible handle allows for easy and convenient storage - Dimensions: 3.25 x 2.75 x 3.75 inches; Capacity: 220ML/7.4 fl oz; Material: 304 Stainless Steel; Weight: 0.25lbs; Color: Silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Silver 7.4oz Stainless Steel Coffee Mug

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7.4oz Silver Insulated Stainless Steel Coffee Mug

anthropic.title_differentiation: Double Wall Insulated, Splash Guard Lid, Collapsible Handle, Rust Resistant, Dishwasher Safe, Lightweight

openai.title_differentiation: Double Wall Insulation, Splash Guard Lid, Collapsible Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Lightweight, Rust Resistant
